context: Tests whether the response identifies the SQL injection vulnerability and provides the correct fix.

checklist.name: Identifies SQL injection
checklist.description: Identifies that string interpolation of req.params.id into the SQL query creates a SQL injection vulnerability

checklist.name: Recommends parameterized queries
checklist.description: Recommends using parameterized/prepared statements (e.g., $1 placeholder or ? with parameter array) as the fix

checklist.name: Shows fixed code
checklist.description: Provides a corrected code example using parameterized queries

checklist.name: Mentions missing error handling
checklist.description: Notes the missing .catch() or try/catch for the database query promise

checklist.name: No incorrect information
checklist.description: Response does not contain factually wrong security advice
